notes: Official career page exposes separate social-recruitment and 2026 campus-recruitment calls to action, but the public HTML view did not expose enumerable job-detail links or an explicit no-openings statement. No salary or role fields were inferred.

The official homepage was identified from the seed, but the current public fetch timed out. No login, captcha, firewall, or other access control was bypassed; recruitment entry and openings remain unverified.

Official corporate homepage was publicly reachable, but no recruitment, talent, or career navigation/text was observed in the public HTML. This is not treated as proof of no openings; member-company or separate ATS follow-up is required.

The seeded official corporate site was previously observed behind an HTTP 403 response and the current public fetch did not yield an auditable recruitment page. No access control was bypassed and no third-party listing was accepted as the official entry.

Seeded official corporate domain was requested through a public fetch, but the request timed out. No login, CAPTCHA, paywall, firewall, or other access control was bypassed; the official recruitment entry and public openings remain unverified.

The seeded domain remains an official-domain candidate. Public search produced no auditable official recruitment result and the current fetch environment did not obtain the page. No third-party listing was accepted as an official entry and no access control was bypassed.

The official group homepage exposes an Information Disclosure > Talent Recruitment entry, and the public recruitment page was reachable. The accessible HTML showed no recruitment announcement or job-detail items and no explicit no-openings statement, so absence of openings is not asserted and member-company or dynamic-source follow-up remains required.

The official corporate homepage resolved publicly, but the accessible response exposed no auditable HTML text or links from which to verify a recruitment entry or enumerate openings. This is not treated as an explicit no-openings conclusion; a compliant rendered-browser or official interface follow-up is required.
The seeded official corporate homepage timed out during public retrieval. No access control was bypassed; the recruitment entry and public openings remain unverified.

The official ENN Energy site was publicly reachable and exposed a Talents section containing only a Talent Concept link. No public job-listing, job-detail, application link, or explicit no-openings statement was observed in the accessible HTML; no role or salary data was inferred.

The official corporate homepage resolved publicly, but the accessible response exposed no auditable HTML text or links from which to verify a recruitment entry or enumerate openings. This is not treated as an explicit no-openings conclusion.

The official corporate site was publicly reachable and its navigation and site map were auditable, but no careers, recruitment, talent, or job entry was observed. Absence of a recruitment signal is not treated as proof of no openings; compliant follow-up through the controlling-group or member-company official channels remains required.

The current official Towngas Smart Energy corporate site was publicly reachable and identified the company, but its accessible navigation exposed no careers, recruitment, talent, job-listing, or application entry. The seeded towngas.com.cn address returned HTTP 418 in the public fetch environment. Absence of a recruitment signal is not treated as proof of no openings; official subsidiary or controlling-group channel follow-up remains required.

The official group site exposes a Talent Recruitment page with separate official campus and social recruitment links to bewg.zhiye.com. Both public ATS links redirected to an information page showing only the recruitment-site title and no enumerable job records or explicit no-openings statement. No login, CAPTCHA, or access control was bypassed and no fields were inferred.

The seeded official corporate homepage timed out during public retrieval and could not be resolved in the secondary public request environment. No access control was bypassed; recruitment entry verification and opening enumeration remain pending.

The seeded official corporate domain could not be obtained through the available public fetch paths in this run; one environment rejected direct opening without a prior indexed result and the secondary public request environment could not resolve the hostname. No third-party listing was promoted and no access control was bypassed.
Official social recruitment index showed 11 announcements dated 2026-01-20 through 2026-06-30 on page 1; three accessible details were normalized conservatively.
